content: New bash scripts under dark-factory/scripts/ (invoked from workflows/archon-dark-factory.yaml bash nodes) should self-locate sibling scripts and clone-root-relative paths via `_SCRIPT_DIR=$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")`, the pattern already established in load_memory_context.sh — not via ${CLONE_DIR:-.}, which the workflow YAML itself documents as 'NOT exported to bash nodes' and is a fallback-fragility footgun. Config at .claude/skills/refinement/config.yaml is two directories above dark-factory/scripts/ (../../ from a script there).

New tests/test_*.sh shell tests are NOT auto-discovered by CI — .github/workflows/ci.yml runs 'python -m pytest tests/ -v' (picks up .py only) plus an explicit hand-maintained list of 'bash tests/test_X.sh' lines. A new shell test must be added to that explicit list or it silently never runs. tests/test_budget_line_trim.sh is a pre-existing example of this gap (written, never wired in).
